ルカは、先ほどのお客に2度も絶頂を許してしまったことを思い出し、<br>悔しさで:
Luca remembered that the previous customer had brought her to
climax twice, and in frustration, she slammed her fist on the table.
ねぇ、知ってた？ さっきのお客さん、<br>闘技場で１３戦連続防衛に成功したチャ:
Hey, did you know? That customer was actually a champion who had
successfully defended his title 13 times in a row at the arena.
ど、どうりで顔に見覚えがあると思ったら……。<br>くぅぅ……でも、あんな不意打:
So that's why his face looked familiar... Ugh... but that cheap shot
was just cowardly...
（不意打ちとはいえ、あの素早い身のこなしで<br>あっという間に関節を極められて:
(Even if it was a surprise attack, it's true that he locked me in a joint
lock in an instant with that quick move...)
（くぅぅぅ～……あの関節技から抜け出せることさえ出来ていれば……）: (Ughh... if only I could have escaped that joint lock...)
その時、娼館の酒場の扉が開き、<br><user>が入って来る。:
At that moment, the door to the brothel's tavern opened, and the
Commander entered.
ルディア、こないだの酒代のことなんだが……: Ludia, about the bar tab from the other day...
おお！ しれーかんいいところに！ お願い！<br>今から実戦の相手になって！ 練:
Oh! Commander, perfect timing! Please be my sparring partner! I want
to practice something!
なんだよ、いきなり……<br>俺はルディアに用事があって来ただけだぞ？:
What's with the sudden request... I just came to see Ludia about
something, you know?
さっき、お客さんに関節技を極められて負けちゃったの！<br>関節技から逃れる方法:
I just lost because a customer caught me in a joint lock! Teach me
how to escape!
そんなこと言われてもなぁ……俺は関節技の達人でもなんでもないぞ？<br>俺じゃ練:
Even so... I'm no master of joint locks or anything. I wouldn't be much
of a practice partner, would I?
すると、ルカはバッグの中から1本のロープを取り出す。: Then, Luca took a rope from her bag.
しれーかん、あたしの両手をこの縄できつく縛って！<br>その状態で勝負だ！: Commander, tie my hands tight with this rope! Then we'll spar!
はぁっ！？ それじゃまるでＳＭプレイだろうが……: Hah! That's just like SM play, you know...
まぁまぁ。ルカさん、連勝記録が破れちゃって相当悔しいみたいだし、<br>付き合っ:
Now, now. Luca seems really upset about her winning streak ending,
so why not go along with it as practice?
ほらほら、ルディアさんもこう言ってるんだし付き合ってよ～！: See, even Ludia says so! Come on, play along!
やったぁ～！ よーし、関節技の攻略法、絶対見つけてやる！<br>さぁ、早く縛って:
Yay! Alright, I'll definitely find a way to counter joint locks! Come on,
tie me up quick! Tie me!
その後、負けず嫌いのルカとの練習は結局１度で終わることなどなく、<br>彼女が納:
After that, the practice with the sore loser Luca didn't end after just
once—they repeated it until morning, until she was satisfied.
